docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, VERONICA DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, CARLOS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-25-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-25-2023 BY STEPHEN M. MURPHY. PLAINTIFF CARLOS ALVAREZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERONICA ALVAREZ IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: STEPHEN M. MURPHY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
